# preference/dpo recipe: one DPO step on the hhh dataset. This exercises the
# SDK's forward_backward_custom path (train_dpo.do_update calls
# forward_backward_custom(data, dpo_loss_fn) at preference/train_dpo.py:436),
# which sends a backward cross_entropy pass with signed weights = -gradient. The
# server must accept those signed weights and use the unnormalized cross-entropy
# surrogate; rejecting them (the original gap) broke every custom loss.
#
# dataset=hhh maps to datasets.load_dataset("Anthropic/hh-rlhf"), satisfied
# offline from a small pre-provisioned classic-cache fixture under
# $HF_HOME/datasets/Anthropic___hh-rlhf (HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 is set by the harness).
# The test skips when that fixture is absent. model_name=Qwen/Qwen3-8B is mapped
# to the cached 0.6B MLX checkpoint by the server. Flags verified against
# recipes/preference/dpo/train.py CLIConfig.

python -m tinker_cookbook.recipes.preference.dpo.train model_name=Qwen/Qwen3-8B renderer_name=qwen3 dataset=hhh log_path=$WORK/run max_steps=1 batch_size=2 dpo_beta=0.1 max_length=512 learning_rate=1e-5 behavior_if_log_dir_exists=delete
exists $WORK/run/metrics.jsonl
grep dpo_loss $WORK/run/metrics.jsonl
